title: TalosCluster
description: Root declaration CRD for a Talos cluster under Seam governance. Declares whether the cluster is bootstrapped from scratch (mode=bootstrap) or imported from existing infrastructure (mode=import). On mode=import the role field is mandatory and must be one of management or tenant. On all mode=bootstrap paths role is absent. platform-schema.md §4.

spec.description: TalosCluster specification. Immutable after admission except for status fields.

mode.description: Declares whether this TalosCluster provisions a new cluster (bootstrap) or records an existing cluster managed outside Seam (import). Immutable after creation.

role.description: Declares the role of this cluster in the Seam topology. Mandatory on mode=import; absent on all mode=bootstrap paths. management: this cluster is the Seam management cluster. tenant: this cluster is a target cluster governed by the management cluster. Drives namespace creation and kubeconfig routing.

talosVersion.description: Talos OS version for this cluster. Used by the Conductor to select a compatible conductor image per INV-012.

capi.description: CAPI integration settings. Optional. When absent the cluster uses the direct bootstrap path.

enabled.description: When true the cluster is managed via Cluster API. When false (or absent) the direct bootstrap path is used.

endpoint.description: API server endpoint for the cluster. Required on mode=import. Optional on mode=bootstrap (derived from Talos machine config).

kubeconfigSecretRef.description: Name of the Secret containing the kubeconfig for this cluster. Required on mode=import. Optional on mode=bootstrap (derived from talosconfig).

talosconfigSecretRef.description: Name of the Secret containing the talosconfig for this cluster.

lineage.description: Sealed causal chain record. Authored once at object creation and immutable thereafter. seam-core-schema.md §5, CLAUDE.md Decision 1.

x-kubernetes-validations.message: role must be present and one of management or tenant when mode is import

status.description: TalosCluster runtime status. Written exclusively by the TalosClusterReconciler.

phase.description: Current lifecycle phase of the cluster.

ready.description: True when the cluster has passed all readiness gates.

conductorReady.description: True when the Conductor agent on this cluster has started and registered its capability manifest. platform-schema.md §12.
